name: flashcart-tools
description: Manage Nintendo DS flashcart SD cards

tools.name: list_volumes
tools.description: List mounted volumes with filesystem type, total size, and free space

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and subdirectories at a path

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Create a directory and parent directories

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory

tools.name: copy_file
tools.description: Copy a file or directory (set recursive for directories)

tools.name: read_bytes
tools.description: Read N bytes at a byte offset from a file

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Download a URL to a local file path

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return the response body as text

tools.name: extract_archive
tools.description: Extract a .7z or .zip archive to a directory

tools.name: resize_image
tools.description: Resize a PNG image to given dimensions

tools.name: image_info
tools.description: Return dimensions and file size of an image

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a text file and return its contents

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write text content to a file

tools.name: read_json
tools.description: Read and parse a JSON file

tools.name: write_json
tools.description: Write a JSON object to a file

tools.name: clean_dot_files
tools.description: Remove AppleDouble ._* files from a directory tree
